## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Amphora;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Amphora { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

pottery, artifact, artefact, vase, ceramics, clay, archaeology, museum, wine, oil
